name: Social - SOLD Post
_security_notes: Approval links are GET (confirm page, no side effect). POST with token publishes.
Content read from Postgres by token — never from query string.
Tokens are UUID v4 (unguessable), single-use (consumed=true after publish).
agentEmail must be validated against internal domain before use.
All address/agent fields are HTML-escaped before email interpolation.
FUB webhook should be verified via FUB-Signature HMAC-SHA256 header (see references/fub-api.md).

messages.content: You write real estate social media posts for The Anchor Group in Palm Coast, Florida. Brand: Dolphins Not Sharks. Fair Housing compliant. SOLD posts celebrate the transaction and agent excellence. 50-120 words. End with: — The Anchor Group

=Write 2 SOLD post variations.
Property: {{$json.address}}, {{$json.city}}, FL
Sale Price: ${{$json.price}} | {{$json.beds}} bed / {{$json.baths}} bath
Agent: {{$json.agent}}

Write exactly 2 variations labeled CELEBRATORY: and GRATEFUL: on separate lines. Each 50-120 words.

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO nightshift.social_drafts (id, workflow, address, tone, content, agent_email) VALUES ('{{$json.token}}', '{{$json.workflow}}', '{{$json.address}}', '{{$json.tone}}', '{{$json.content.replace(/'/g, "''")}}}', '{{$json.agentEmail}}')

parameters.subject: =SOLD! Post ready — {{$json.address[0]}}
parameters.html:
=

Congratulations {{$json.agent[0]}} on the close!

Two post options are ready for {{$json.address[0]}}, FL. Click a button to preview the full text — nothing posts until you confirm on the next screen.

{{$json.tone.map((tone,i)=>'' + tone + '').join(' ')}}

— Anchor Group AI

parameters.query: =SELECT id, tone, content, consumed FROM nightshift.social_drafts WHERE id = '{{$json.query.token}}'

parameters.responseBody:
=

SOLD Post — {{$json[0].tone}} Tone

{{$json[0].consumed ? '

This draft has already been used.

' : '
' + $json[0].content + '
'}}

parameters.query: =UPDATE nightshift.social_drafts SET consumed=true, consumed_at=now() WHERE id='{{$json.body.token}}' AND consumed=false RETURNING id, content, tone

parameters.responseBody:
✓ SOLD post published!

It's live on the Anchor Group Facebook page.

This approval link has already been used.

The post was already published, or the link expired.
